vocab.meaning: khác xa, tiến bộ vượt bậc so với
vocab.example: The technology they use in classrooms now is light years away from the simple chalkboards we had when I was a kid.

vocab.meaning: một sự biến đổi hoàn toàn, sâu sắc
vocab.example: There has been a sea change in the way teachers interact with students, moving toward a much more collaborative approach.

vocab.meaning: dẫn đầu, ở vị trí tiên phong
vocab.example: My primary school is now at the forefront of digital learning, providing every student with a personal tablet.

vocab.meaning: thay đổi đến mức không còn nhận ra được nữa
vocab.example: The old playground has changed out of all recognition; it's now a sophisticated multi-purpose sports complex.

vocab.meaning: tân trang, sửa đổi diện mạo bên ngoài
vocab.example: The school board decided to give the entire campus a facelift, painting the buildings in vibrant, modern colors.

vocab.meaning: trở nên phổ biến hoặc được chấp nhận rộng rãi
vocab.example: Extracurricular activities like coding and robotics have really gained ground compared to the limited options we had back then.

vocab.meaning: ngày càng trở nên thành công/mạnh mẽ hơn
vocab.example: Since I left, the school's reputation has gone from strength to strength, winning numerous national awards.

vocab.meaning: lối cũ, kiểu cũ (thường mang tính truyền thống/lạc hậu)
vocab.example: While most facilities are modern, a few teachers still stick to the old school methods of strict discipline.

vocab.meaning: bắt kịp thời đại, thay đổi để phù hợp với xu thế
vocab.example: It's heartening to see my alma mater move with the times by incorporating environmental sustainability into the curriculum.

vocab.meaning: ở giai đoạn sơ khai, mới bắt đầu
vocab.example: When I was there, the computer lab was in its infancy, but now it's a fully-fledged innovation hub.
